summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AdventurePlex Loyalty Program with three portals (Customer, Staff, Admin). All core functionality working correctly including user registration with high-entropy IDs, digital pass with QR codes, staff authentication, stamp/redeem operations, and real-time analytics dashboard.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/register creates users with high-entropy IDs (16 hex chars)
Backend: POST /api/register validates name and phone requirements
Backend: POST /api/register handles duplicate phone numbers (409 status)
Backend: GET /api/user/[id] returns complete user data with stamps and transactions
Backend: GET /api/user/[id] returns 404 for non-existent users
Backend: POST /api/stamp increments stamp count and lifetime visits
Backend: POST /api/stamp prevents adding stamps when user has 10 stamps
Backend: POST /api/stamp validates user ID and returns proper error codes
Backend: POST /api/redeem works when user has 10 stamps and resets count to 0
Backend: POST /api/redeem prevents redemption when user has less than 10 stamps
Backend: POST /api/redeem validates user ID and returns proper error codes
Backend: POST /api/staff/verify accepts correct PIN (1234) and returns staff info
Backend: POST /api/staff/verify rejects incorrect PIN with 401 status
Backend: POST /api/staff/verify validates PIN requirement
Backend: GET /api/analytics returns all required metrics (totalCustomers, stampsToday, etc.)
Backend: GET /api/analytics includes recent activity with user names and timestamps
Frontend: Homepage loads with AdventurePlex branding and three portal navigation
Frontend: Join Now button navigates to customer registration page
Frontend: Staff Login button navigates to staff login page
Frontend: Admin Dashboard link navigates to admin analytics page
Frontend: Customer registration form accepts name and phone input
Frontend: Customer registration redirects to digital pass page after successful signup
Frontend: Digital pass displays user name, QR code, and stamp progress grid
Frontend: Digital pass shows correct stamp count (1/10 format)
Frontend: Digital pass has real-time polling every 3 seconds with last sync indicator
Frontend: Staff login page accepts 4-digit PIN input via number pad
Frontend: Staff login with PIN 1234 redirects to scanner page
Frontend: Staff scanner page shows QR scanning interface with camera permissions request
Frontend: Staff scanner has logout functionality that returns to login page
Frontend: Admin dashboard displays all 6 analytics cards with live data
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows recent activity feed with user actions
Frontend: Admin dashboard has auto-refresh every 10 seconds indicator
Frontend: All pages have proper navigation back to home
Integration: User registration creates database record and generates pass URL
Integration: Digital pass fetches user data from API and displays correctly
Integration: Staff authentication stores session and protects scanner page
Integration: Analytics API provides real-time data to admin dashboard
Integration: Stamp operations from backend tests reflect in analytics dashboard
